name: Don's Venison Chili
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown the meat in bacon grease.
2. Saute onions, chopped jalapenos, and green bell peppers in bacon grease until onions become transparent.
3. Bring beer to a boil and add meat, seasonings (excluding cumin), and onions/peppers to the pot. Allow to boil for 5-7 minutes.
4. Reduce heat to medium and add tomatoes and tomato sauce. Stir occasionally while cooking for 30 minutes.
5. Reduce heat to simmer and cook for 1 hour.
